ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "is_social_sharing_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has enabled social sharing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heads" (
  "head_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each head style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the head style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the head style */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the style belongs */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score based on usage */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to a thumbnail image of the style */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the style is a premium feature */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the style if it is a premium feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("head_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chests" (
  "chest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chest style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the chest style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chest style */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the style belongs */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score based on usage */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to a thumbnail image of the style */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the style is a premium feature */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the style if it is a premium feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legs" (
  "legs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leg style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the leg style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the leg style */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the style belongs */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score based on usage */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to a thumbnail image of the style */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the style is a premium feature */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the style if it is a premium feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hairstyles" (
  "hairstyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hairstyle */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the hairstyle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hairstyle */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the style belongs */,

  "price" TEXT /* Price of the style if it is a premium feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hairstyle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "haircolors" (
  "haircolor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hair color */,

  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the style belongs */,

  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the style is a premium feature */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the style if it is a premium feature */,

CREATE TABLE "chestdecals" (
  "chestdecal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chest decal */,

  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chest decal */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the style belongs */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score based on usage */,

  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the style is a premium feature */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the style if it is a premium feature */,

CREATE TABLE "headcolors" (
  "headcolor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each head color */,

CREATE TABLE "eyesstyles" (
  "eyesstyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eye style */,

  "mouthstyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mouth style */,
